meaning: adj.心肠软的,心地温和的,温厚的
examples: And be ye kind one to another, tenderhearted, forgiving one another, even as God for Christ's sake hath forgiven you.
If you're gonna love me, you're gonna have to love the whole package: the tenderhearted poet and the crazy daredevil.
She is a sweet and tenderhearted creature, and her inability to ask for a raise, hail a cab, or defend herself from her unpleasant mother are all part of her sweetness.
His wry, wisenheimer humor is good medicine for our cruel but tenderhearted community.
Along the way, she falls in love with one of the participants, Michel (Carlo Brandt), a hard-nosed, tenderhearted small-time racketeer who is soon to be released.
